---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div style="padding:3rem 6vw; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#f0a500; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// réalisations</p>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem); font-weight:800; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Ce que les praticiens construisent</h1>
    <p style="color:#6b7280; font-size:0.9rem; margin:0 0 2rem 0;">Pipelines, dashboards, APIs, bootcamps, chaînes YT — du concret.</p>

    <!-- Filtres type -->
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">
      <button onclick="filter('type','all',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #f0a500; color:#f0a500; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        Tous
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('type','pipeline',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        Pipeline
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('type','dashboard',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        Dashboard
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('type','api',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        API
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('type','bootcamp',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        Bootcamp
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('type','youtube',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        YouTube
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('type','app',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        App
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('type','cours',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        Cours
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('type','autre',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-type">
        Autre
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Filtres catégorie -->
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem;">
      <button onclick="filter('cat','all',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #f0a500; color:#f0a500; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-cat">
        Toutes catégories
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('cat','data',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-cat">
        Data
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('cat','devops',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-cat">
        DevOps
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('cat','cloud',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-cat">
        Cloud
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('cat','ia',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-cat">
        IA
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('cat','cyber',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-cat">
        Cyber
      </button>
      <button onclick="filter('cat','dev',this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="btn-cat">
        Dev
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="realisations-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr)); gap:1.25rem;"></div>
  <p id="no-results" style="display:none; color:#6b7280; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.85rem; margin-top:2rem;">Aucune réalisation pour ces filtres.</p>

</div>

<script>
const realisations = [
  {
    slug:      "data-engineering-bootcamp",
    title:     "Data Engineering Bootcamp",
    praticien: "Diakité Mamadou Youssouf",
    praticien_slug: "diakite",
    category:  "data",
    type:      "bootcamp",
    stack:     ["Python", "Airflow", "dbt", "Spark", "GCP", "Kafka"],
    date:      "2023-01",
    demo_url:  "https://diakite-data.github.io/data-engineering-bootcamp/",
    repo_url:  "https://github.com/diakite-data/data-engineering-bootcamp",
    excerpt:   "35 modules · 1100+ apprenants · 40+ pays. Le bootcamp Data Engineering complet en français."
  }
];

let activeType = 'all';
let activeCat  = 'all';

const typeLabels = {
  pipeline:    'Pipeline',
  dashboard:   'Dashboard',
  api:         'API',
  bootcamp:    'Bootcamp',
  youtube:     'YouTube',
  app:         'App',
  cours:       'Cours',
  podcast:     'Podcast',
  newsletter:  'Newsletter',
  blog:        'Blog',
  autre:       'Autre'
};

const catColors = {
  data:   { color:'#60a5fa', bg:'#60a5fa0d', border:'#60a5fa22' },
  devops: { color:'#34d399', bg:'#34d3990d', border:'#34d39922' },
  cloud:  { color:'#a78bfa', bg:'#a78bfa0d', border:'#a78bfa22' },
  ia:     { color:'#f0a500', bg:'#f0a5000d', border:'#f0a50022' },
  cyber:  { color:'#ff4560', bg:'#ff45600d', border:'#ff456022' },
  dev:    { color:'#f472b6', bg:'#f472b60d', border:'#f472b622' },
};

function renderRealisations(list) {
  const grid  = document.getElementById('realisations-grid');
  const noRes = document.getElementById('no-results');
  if (!list.length) { grid.innerHTML = ''; noRes.style.display = 'block'; return; }
  noRes.style.display = 'none';
  grid.innerHTML = list.map(r => {
    const c = catColors[r.category] || catColors.data;
    const links = [];
    if (r.demo_url) links.push(`<a href="${r.demo_url}" target="_blank" style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; text-decoration:none;">Demo →</a>`);
    if (r.repo_url) links.push(`<a href="${r.repo_url}" target="_blank" style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:2px; text-decoration:none;">Repo →</a>`);
    return `
    <div style="background:#12141a; border:1px solid #1e2128; border-radius:6px; padding:1.5rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.75rem; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
         onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#f0a500'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='#1e2128'">

      <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:${c.color}; border:1px solid ${c.border}; background:${c.bg}; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:2px;">
          ${r.category.toUpperCase()}
        </span>
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:2px;">
          ${typeLabels[r.type] || r.type}
        </span>
      </div>

      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0;">${r.title}</h3>

      <a href="../praticiens/${r.praticien_slug}.html"
         style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#f0a500; text-decoration:none;">
        ${r.praticien}
      </a>

      <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.6; margin:0; flex:1;">${r.excerpt}</p>

      <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.4rem;">
        ${r.stack.map(s => `
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.62rem; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:2px;">${s}</span>
        `).join('')}
      </div>

      <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:0.25rem;">
        ${links.join('')}
      </div>

    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function filter(dim, val, btn) {
  if (dim === 'type') {
    activeType = val;
    document.querySelectorAll('.btn-type').forEach(b => { b.style.borderColor='#1e2128'; b.style.color='#6b7280'; });
  } else {
    activeCat = val;
    document.querySelectorAll('.btn-cat').forEach(b => { b.style.borderColor='#1e2128'; b.style.color='#6b7280'; });
  }
  btn.style.borderColor = '#f0a500';
  btn.style.color = '#f0a500';

  let filtered = realisations;
  if (activeType !== 'all') filtered = filtered.filter(r => r.type === activeType);
  if (activeCat  !== 'all') filtered = filtered.filter(r => r.category === activeCat);
  renderRealisations(filtered);
}

renderRealisations(realisations);
</script>
```
